description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a slightly bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by three evenly spaced metallic hoops. The wood has a natural, medium-brown color with visible grain texture, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The metallic hoops are gray and encircle the barrel horizontally, providing structural reinforcement and a visual contrast to the wood. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and made of the same wood as the sides, with no visible openings or spouts. There are no handles, markings, or decorative elements present on the exterior. This type of barrel is commonly used for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in urban, industrial, or outdoor settings.
description: A medium-brown wooden barrel with three gray metal hoops, flat wooden top and bottom, and a rustic, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from a slightly angled front, showing the curvature of the staves and all three metal hoops clearly.
description_view_1: This view presents the barrel from a different angle, emphasizing the symmetry and the even spacing of the metal hoops.
description_view_2: The barrel is shown from another side, with the wood grain and metallic bands remaining consistent and no new features visible.
description_view_3: This view highlights the opposite side, again showing the same three metal hoops and the continuous wooden texture.
